title: Uruguayan-Style Garlic Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful dish inspired by the flavors of Uruguay, featuring a savory garlic stir fry with a hint of romance.
instructions: Cook noodles according to package instructions; set aside.
Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add chorizo (if using) and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until lightly browned.
Add garlic and red bell pepper; cook for an additional 3-4 minutes.
Stir in cooked noodles and cook for 1-2 minutes, until noodles are well coated with sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped fresh parsley (if desired).
